'''wajosho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:foetoscope|foetoscope]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-j-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:foetoscope|foetoscope]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| wajosho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:wæjesheth|wæjesheth]] || [[word:wæjeshej|wæjeshej]] || [[word:wæjeshesh|wæjeshesh]] || [[word:wæjeshe|wæjeshe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:wajojoshoth|wajojoshoth]] || [[word:wajojoshoj|wajojoshoj]] || [[word:wajojoshosh|wajojoshosh]] || [[word:wajojosho|wajojosho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:wajoshoth|wajoshoth]] || [[word:wajoshoj|wajoshoj]] || [[word:wajoshosh|wajoshosh]] || [[word:wajosho|wajosho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:wajofshoth|wajofshoth]] || [[word:wajofshoj|wajofshoj]] || [[word:wajofshosh|wajofshosh]] || [[word:wajofshof|wajofshof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:wajoshotho|wajoshotho]] || [[word:wajoshojo|wajoshojo]] || [[word:wajoshosho|wajoshosho]] || [[word:wajoshoko|wajoshoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:wajoshoth|wajoshoth]] || [[word:wajoshoj|wajoshoj]] || [[word:wajoshosh|wajoshosh]] || [[word:wajosho|wajosho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:wajoshothol|wajoshothol]] || [[word:wajoshojol|wajoshojol]] || [[word:wajoshoshol|wajoshoshol]] || [[word:wajoshokol|wajoshokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:wajoshothotho|wajoshothotho]] || [[word:wajoshojojo|wajoshojojo]] || [[word:wajoshoshosho|wajoshoshosho]] || [[word:wajoshoko|wajoshoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:wajoshothon|wajoshothon]] || [[word:wajoshojon|wajoshojon]] || [[word:wajoshoshon|wajoshoshon]] || [[word:wajoshokon|wajoshokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:wajoshothoro|wajoshothoro]] || [[word:wajoshojoro|wajoshojoro]] || [[word:wajoshoshoro|wajoshoshoro]] || [[word:wajoshokoro|wajoshokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a335513}}
